name: Open Problems META-DB (Rei-AIOS) — Public Snapshot
description: Public snapshot of Rei-AIOS Open Problems META-DB. Citation via Paper 130 DOI 10.5281/zenodo.19700758.

tierDescription.tier1: World-public open problems (2570 entries) — Wikipedia / Kourovka / Erdős / Millennium / Smale / Hilbert / Green / OEIS etc.
tierDescription.tier2: Rei Invention Engine approved conjectures (10 entries) — CC-BY 4.0 attribution required
tierDescription.tier3: Claude Code research discoveries (3 entries) — subset of private META-DB. Some discoveries withheld pending Paper 135-136 publication.

paperReference.note: Paper 130 cited totalProblems=2572 (Tier 1 at time of writing). Current public snapshot reflects disk truth + Tier 2/3 additions.

held_back_info.reason: Tier 3 entries with reiAssessment.publicExcluded=true are withheld pending scheduled paper publication.

citationPreferred: Fujimoto, N. (2026). Open Problems META-DB (Rei-AIOS). Paper 130. Zenodo. https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.19700758
